summary: Repair-only remediation shard for #81778. The hydrated state shows #81778 is the open, maintainer-editable canonical PR for #81751, with current main still missing shell-wrapped argv recognition in service audit. Merge and close actions are blocked by the job, so the result plans an in-place contributor-branch repair plus a cluster-scoped executable fix artifact.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair the existing maintainer-editable contributor PR #81778 in place so gateway service audit recognizes shell-wrapped LaunchAgent commands and reuses the expanded argv for port checks without broadening the parser to unsafe substring matching.
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## What Problem This Solves

Fixes #81751. `openclaw gateway status` can falsely report `Service command does not include the gateway subcommand` when a macOS LaunchAgent starts OpenClaw through a shell wrapper such as `/bin/zsh -lc "... index.js gateway --port 18890"`.

## Why This Change Was Made

Current main only checks top-level `ProgramArguments` entries for an exact `gateway` token and only scans top-level argv for `--port`. The repair should derive the effective command tokens from recognized shell `-c`/`-lc` wrapper forms, then feed those tokens through the existing gateway-subcommand and port-audit decisions. Keep the parser bounded: recognize common shell command flags and token boundaries, do not treat arbitrary substrings such as `--gateway-url` as a gateway subcommand or port.

## User Impact

Healthy shell-wrapped LaunchAgent gateway services stop showing a false aggressive service-config warning, and matching wrapped `--port` values do not produce stale/missing port diagnostics.

## Evidence

- Current main at bb267537057fa00824f9d5bda25b2702ade1003a still has `hasGatewaySubcommand` checking only `arg === "gateway"` in `src/daemon/service-audit.ts`.
- The canonical issue is #81751 and the repair source PR is #81778 by @liaoandi.
- Required validation: `pnpm test src/daemon/service-audit.test.ts` and `pnpm check:changed` after rebasing/updating the branch.
credit_notes: Repair contributor PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/81778 by @liaoandi in place; keep the contributor branch and attribution when updating it.
Preserve source issue credit for https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/81751 by @liaoandi.

Mention earlier superseded attempts https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/81755 by @Bartok9 and https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/81847 by @IWhatsskill only as historical related context if the final PR body needs provenance.
